# Beudox HR - Technical Documentation for AI Assistants

## Project Overview
Beudox HR is a comprehensive Human Resources Management System built as a single-page application (SPA) using modern React patterns. It provides complete HR functionality including employee management, performance evaluations, payroll, and organizational tools.

## Architecture & Technology Stack

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite with SWC for fast compilation
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes and role-based access control
- **State Management**: React Query (TanStack Query) for server state, React Context for auth state
- **UI Library**: shadcn/ui built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod schema validation
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design system

### Backend Integration
- **Database**: Supabase PostgreSQL
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with role-based permissions
- **API**: Supabase client with real-time subscriptions
- **Edge Functions**: Supabase Functions for business logic (payroll generation, notifications, PDF generation)

### Key Dependencies
- `@supabase/supabase-js`: Database and auth client
- `@tanstack/react-query`: Data fetching and caching
- `@tiptap/react`: Rich text editing for HR policies
- `react-router-dom`: Client-side routing
- `react-hook-form`: Form management
- `zod`: Runtime type validation
- `recharts`: Data visualization
- `date-fns`: Date manipulation

## Application Structure

### Routing Architecture
The application uses a hierarchical routing structure with protected routes:

```
/ (root) → Redirects to /dashboard or /login
├── /login - Authentication
├── /forgot-password - Password recovery
├── /dashboard - Main dashboard
├── /employees/* - Employee management
│   ├── /employees - Employee list
│   ├── /employees/new - New employee form
│   ├── /employees/:id - Employee profile
│   └── /employees/:id/edit - Edit employee
├── /projects/* - Project management
├── /clients/* - Client management
├── /invoices/* - Invoice management
├── /hr-policies/* - HR policy documents
├── /evaluations/* - Performance evaluations
│   ├── /evaluations - Quarterly evaluations
│   └── /evaluations/daily - Daily evaluations
├── /loans - Loan management
├── /payroll - Payroll processing
├── /my-payslip - Employee payslips
├── /finance - Financial reporting
├── /holidays - Public holidays
├── /settings - System configuration
└── * (404) - Not found page
```

### Component Architecture
- **Layout Components**: `AppLayout`, `AppSidebar`, `TopBar`, `NotificationBell`
- **UI Components**: Extensive shadcn/ui component library (50+ components)
- **Feature Components**: Organized by domain (evaluations, settings, etc.)
- **Form Components**: Reusable form inputs with validation

### Data Flow
1. **Authentication**: Supabase Auth manages user sessions
2. **Authorization**: Role-based access control with `canAccess()` function
3. **Data Fetching**: React Query handles API calls with caching
4. **Real-time Updates**: Supabase subscriptions for live data
5. **File Handling**: Supabase Storage for avatars and documents

## Key Files & Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main application component with routing configuration
- `src/index.css`: Global styles and Tailwind imports

### Authentication & Authorization
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx`: Authentication state management
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based permission logic
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration

### Layout & Navigation
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main application layout wrapper
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar with role-based menu items
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar with notifications
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx`: Custom NavLink component for active state styling

### Key Business Logic Components
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx`: Displays evaluation history with filtering
- `src/components/hr-policies/RichTextEditor.tsx`: TipTap-based rich text editor
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`: Employee selection component with search
- `src/components/settings/`: Various settings tabs for system configuration

### Utility Functions
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/format-role.ts`: Role formatting utilities
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Notification sending logic

## Database Schema Insights

Based on the migration files, the system manages:

### Core Entities
- **employees**: User profiles with roles, departments, contact info
- **companies**: Multi-tenant company data
- **departments**: Organizational structure
- **roles**: Permission roles (ceo, hr_manager, team_lead, employee)

### HR Features
- **evaluations**: Quarterly performance reviews
- **daily_evaluations**: Daily feedback system
- **hr_policies**: Rich text policy documents
- **loans**: Employee loan tracking

### Business Management
- **projects**: Project tracking with assignments
- **clients**: Client relationship management
- **invoices**: Invoice generation and tracking
- **payroll**: Automated payroll processing

### System Configuration
- **evaluation_parameters**: Customizable evaluation criteria
- **expense_categories**: Categorization for expenses
- **public_holidays**: Company holiday calendar

## Development Patterns

### Component Patterns
- **Compound Components**: Many UI components use compound patterns (e.g., Command with sub-components)
- **Render Props**: Used in some complex components for flexibility
- **Custom Hooks**: Business logic extracted into reusable hooks

### Data Patterns
- **React Query**: All API calls use useQuery/useMutation
- **Optimistic Updates**: Immediate UI updates with rollback on error
- **Real-time**: Supabase subscriptions for live updates

### Styling Patterns
- **Utility-First**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
- **Component Variants**: shadcn/ui uses class-variance-authority for variants
- **Dark Mode**: next-themes for theme switching

### Testing Strategy
- **Unit Tests**: Vitest for component and utility testing
- **E2E Tests**: Playwright for critical user flows
- **Component Testing**: Testing Library for React component testing

## Security Considerations

### Authentication
- Supabase handles authentication with JWT tokens
- Password recovery and invite flows implemented
- Session management with automatic refresh

### Authorization
- Role-based access control at route and component level
- Database-level RLS (Row Level Security) policies
- API calls include proper authorization checks

### Data Protection
- Sensitive data encrypted in transit and at rest
- File uploads validated and stored securely
- Audit trails for sensitive operations

## Performance Optimizations

- **Code Splitting**: Vite handles automatic code splitting
- **Lazy Loading**: Route-based code splitting
- **Query Caching**: React Query caches API responses
- **Image Optimization**: Proper image handling and lazy loading
- **Bundle Optimization**: Tree shaking and minification

## Deployment & DevOps

- **Build**: Vite production build with asset optimization
- **Environment**: Environment variables for configuration
- **Database**: Supabase migrations for schema management
- **CI/CD**: Configurable build and test pipelines

This documentation provides the technical foundation for understanding and contributing to the Beudox HR codebase.
